brand.name: Glambox
brand.tagline: Premium beauty popups with instant booking

hero.headline: Glambox is where your glow story begins
hero.subheadline: Step into luminous popups designed to feel like a fresh start: expert hands, radiant finishes, and rituals that change how you see yourself.

sections.headline: Colour, care, and confidence in every visit
sections.body: Glambox is built for women who want beauty to feel joyful, expressive, and deeply personal.

items.title: Heart-first consultations
items.body: We listen to your story, then design a look that feels like you.

items.title: Glittering spaces
items.body: Tuscan warmth, golden light, and playful glam accents everywhere you look.

items.title: Glow-now booking
items.body: Pick your popup, choose your time, and step into the glow.

sections.headline: Beauty that supports women’s wellbeing
sections.body: Glambox is a pause in a busy life — a space that honours women’s health, confidence, and care at every stage.

items.title: Stress‑softening rituals
items.body: We design appointments that calm the nervous system and leave you feeling steadier.

items.title: Care for every season
items.body: From new chapters to new priorities, our teams tailor care to how your body and life feel now.

items.title: Joy as self‑care
items.body: Small moments of beauty can be powerful — we make them intentional and restorative.

explore.headline: Choose the glow that matches your life
explore.body: Each popup is a different love letter — hair, nails, and wellness designed for the way you want to feel.

cards.title: Hair Atelier
cards.body: Signature cuts, colour artistry, and restorative rituals that make you feel radiant.

cards.title: Nail Studio
cards.body: Polished manicures, nail art, and trend-led finishes with a feel-good twist.

cards.title: Wellness Lounge
cards.body: Skin therapy, mindful recovery, and glow rituals to reset your whole energy.

cards.title: Glambox Kitchen
cards.body: Custom light meals, bagels, croissants, and chef-crafted presets.

bookingPage.headline: Book a Glambox visit
bookingPage.body: Start with a popup, then choose the service, consultant, and time that fits your day.
bookingPage.popupLinksBody: Visit any popup to browse services, consultants, and inspiration.
bookingPage.bookingBody: Select a popup, pick a service, and book with a recommended consultant.
bookingPage.confirmationBody: We will send a reminder with prep details.
bookingPage.missingSelection: Select a date and time to confirm.
bookingPage.emptyConsultant: No consultants available for this service.

faqPage.headline: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.body: Thoughtful answers to help you feel confident before your visit.

items.question: How do I book a service?
items.answer: Choose your popup, select a service, and reserve a time. You will see confirmation details instantly.

items.question: Can I change or reschedule?
items.answer: Yes. You can reschedule from your dashboard or by contacting Client Care up to 24 hours before your appointment.

items.question: Do you take walk-ins?
items.answer: We recommend booking ahead to guarantee availability, but we can often accommodate same-day requests.

items.question: How are consultants matched to services?
items.answer: Each service lists the consultants trained for that treatment so you always book with a specialist.

items.question: Can I request a specific consultant?
items.answer: Absolutely. Choose your preferred consultant during booking or note your request for Client Care.

items.question: What should I bring to my appointment?
items.answer: Bring inspiration photos if helpful, and let us know about allergies, sensitivities, or preferences.

items.question: Do you ship products?
items.answer: Yes. We offer standard delivery across major metro areas with tracking provided at checkout.

items.question: Can I return a product?
items.answer: Unopened products can be returned within 14 days. Contact Client Care for assistance.

items.question: Are products suitable for sensitive skin?
items.answer: Many are. Share your sensitivities in your health profile so we can recommend the best options.

supportPage.headline: Client Care
supportPage.body: We are here to support your bookings, purchases, and wellness preferences.

channels.label: WhatsApp
channels.description: Fastest response for bookings and reschedules.

channels.label: Telephone
channels.description: Speak with a Client Care specialist.

hours: 24/7 support — someone is always available to chat.

uiKit.headline: Glambox UI Kit
uiKit.body: Reusable components powered by JSON-first content and theme tokens.
